description_long: This is a classic Santa Claus hat, featuring a tall, conical red crown made from a soft, felt-like material. The base of the hat is encircled by a thick, plush white band that appears fluffy and comfortable. The crown tapers to a point, which is slightly bent to one side, giving the hat a whimsical and festive appearance. The surface texture of the red crown is matte and slightly fuzzy, while the white band is visibly softer and more textured. There are no visible decorative elements such as pom-poms, embroidery, or logos. The hat is lightweight and designed to be worn on the head, typically during holiday celebrations.
description: A classic Santa Claus hat with a tall, red, conical crown and a thick, plush white band at the base. The hat is soft, festive, and slightly bent at the tip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full red conical crown and the thick, white plush band encircling the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bent tip of the red crown and the plush texture of the white band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical taper of the red crown and the even width of the white band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the bent tip of the crown visible, emphasizing the hat's playful shape.
